message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.3 tick 184 — final 3 lifecycle helpers cx-threaded

RusticMaple: set_execution_waiting + complete_execution + mark_
trigger_event_handled each gained _with_cx + _maybe_cx dispatcher
siblings. 13 call sites migrated (12 in run_workflow_inner, 1 in
abort_execution_with_cx). Every lifecycle-helper storage seam in
run_workflow_inner now cx-threaded when cx is Some. 31/31 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
